content: Cessna Citation CJ2: two-engine climb rate ~3800fpm sea level (single-engine ~1100fpm); high-speed cruise 407kt, long-range cruise 352kt; time to climb to 37000ft ~17min; approach ref speed calculated as 1.3 x Vs (typical CJ2 Vref ~100-105kt at typical landing weight, not directly returned by search).
